executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
CRITICAL SETUP — FRESH USER ACCOUNT: anthonyah1315@gmail.com / 12345678. NO existing data.

CRITICAL LOGIN RULE: Every test that navigates to /login MUST call:
  await page.wait_for_selector('input[type="email"]', timeout=15000)
BEFORE filling any field. The page shows a "Verificando sesión activa..." spinner that must clear first. This applies to ALL tests.

Tests run sequentially and share the same backend. Data created in earlier tests persists.

=== PHASE 1 — LOGIN (TC003, TC004, TC005) ===
TC003: Navigate to /login, wait for email input, fill anthonyah1315@gmail.com / 12345678, submit, assert redirect to /dashboard.
TC004: Navigate to /login, wait for email input, fill anthonyah1315@gmail.com / wrongpassword, submit, assert error toast appears.
TC005: Navigate to /login, wait for email input, submit empty form, assert required-field validation errors.

=== PHASE 2 — DASHBOARD EMPTY STATE (TC008, TC009, TC011) ===
TC008: Login → /dashboard. Verify monthly summary cards (Total Income, Expenses, Balance) are visible. Navigate prev/next month with arrow buttons.
TC009: Login → /dashboard. With no projects/data, verify the page handles empty state gracefully (no crash, empty state UI visible).
TC011: Login → /dashboard. Open the project dropdown/selector. Since no projects exist, it shows empty or "All projects". Verify the UI responds without error.

=== PHASE 3 — PARTNERS DIRECTORY (TC044, TC045, TC048, TC050, TC049) ===
TC044: Login → /partners. Verify page loads and shows empty state or list.
TC045: Login → /partners → click "New partner" → fill Name: "Partner A E2E", Email: "partnera@test.com" → submit → verify "Partner A E2E" appears in list. Then immediately create a second partner: Name: "Partner B E2E" using the same New partner button. Both must exist after this test.
TC048: Login → /partners → click "Partner A E2E" to open detail → edit name to "Partner A E2E Updated" or update any field → save → verify change reflected.
TC050: Login → /partners → click "New partner" → submit with empty name → verify validation error on name field.
TC049: Login → /partners → open "Partner B E2E" detail page → delete it → verify it no longer appears in /partners list. "Partner A E2E Updated" must remain.

=== PHASE 4 — PAYMENT METHODS (TC051, TC052, TC053, TC055, TC054) ===
TC051: Login → /payment-methods. Verify page loads (empty state ok).
TC052: Login → /payment-methods → click "New payment method" → fill Name: "Card E2E", Type: card → submit → verify "Card E2E" appears. Then create second: Name: "Cash E2E", Type: cash → submit. Both must exist.
TC053: Login → /payment-methods → click "Card E2E" → edit name to "Card E2E Updated" → save → verify update.
TC055: Login → /payment-methods → click "New payment method" → submit with empty name → verify validation error.
TC054: Login → /payment-methods → open "Cash E2E" detail → delete it → verify removed. "Card E2E Updated" must remain for later tests.

=== PHASE 5 — PROJECT MANAGEMENT (TC014, TC012, TC013) ===
TC014: Login → /projects → click "New" → submit with empty name → verify required field validation error.
TC012: Login → /projects → click "New" → fill Name: "E2E Test Project", Currency: USD (or default) → submit → verify "E2E Test Project" appears in list.
TC013: Login → /projects → open options menu on "E2E Test Project" → click Edit → change name to "E2E Test Project Updated" or update description → save → verify updated name in list.

=== PHASE 6 — PROJECT SETTINGS: ASSIGN PARTNER (TC040) ===
TC040: Login → /projects → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → click Settings tab → find Partners section → select "Partner A E2E Updated" from dropdown → enter split: 50 → click Add/Save → verify partner appears in the project's partner list. If the Settings tab has a payment method section, also assign "Card E2E Updated" as the payment method for this partner. Then click Partners tab to verify partner balance section loads.

=== PHASE 7 — EXPENSES TAB (TC020, TC016, TC018) ===
TC020: Login → /projects → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → click Expenses tab → verify tab loads (empty state ok).
TC016: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Expenses tab → click "New expense" → fill Title: "Expense E2E 001", Amount: 500, Date: 2026-03-15, Category: (leave empty or pick if exists), Payment Method: "Card E2E Updated" → submit → verify "Expense E2E 001" appears.
TC018: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Expenses tab → click "New expense" → submit empty → verify required field validation errors (title and amount required).

=== PHASE 8 — INCOMES TAB (TC026, TC022, TC024) ===
TC026: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → click Incomes tab → verify tab loads.
TC022: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Incomes tab → click "New income" → fill Title: "Income E2E 001", Amount: 1000, Date: 2026-03-15, Payment Method: "Card E2E Updated" → submit → verify "Income E2E 001" appears.
TC024: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Incomes tab → click "New income" → submit empty → verify validation errors.

=== PHASE 9 — CATEGORIES TAB (TC027, TC031) ===
TC027: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Categories tab → click "New category" → fill Name: "Category E2E 001", pick any color → submit → verify it appears in list.
TC031: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Budget tab → verify tab loads and shows budget UI (empty state ok).

=== PHASE 10 — BUDGET TAB (TC032) ===
TC032: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Budget tab → set a budget amount (e.g. 5000) → save → verify the budget is displayed with utilization info.

=== PHASE 11 — OBLIGATIONS TAB (TC035, TC036, TC038) ===
TC035: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Obligations tab → verify tab loads.
TC036: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Obligations tab → click "New obligation" → fill Title: "Obligation E2E 001", Amount: 500, Due Date: 2026-04-30 → submit → verify appears in list.
TC038: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Obligations tab → click "New obligation" → submit empty → verify required field validation errors.

=== PHASE 12 — PARTNER SETTLEMENTS TAB (TC041, TC042) ===
TC041: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Partners tab → if settlement creation is available, click "New settlement" → fill required fields (amount, partners) → submit → verify settlement appears.
TC042: Login → open "E2E Test Project Updated" → Partners tab → find the settlement created in TC041 → delete it → verify it is removed.

=== PHASE 13 — CLEANUP: DELETE PROJECT (TC015) ===
TC015: Login → /projects → open options menu on "E2E Test Project Updated" → click Delete → confirm in dialog → verify project no longer appears in /projects list.
